hero.title: Professional Cleaning Services at Your Doorstep
hero.subtitle: Book professional cleaning easily online. Deep cleaning of furniture, carpets, mattresses, and much more.

why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Us?
why_choose_us.subtitle: We combine professional equipment with eco-friendly products for the best results.
why_choose_us.item1_desc: No hidden fees — transparent pricing from the start.
why_choose_us.item2_desc: Low-moisture formulas, safe for children and allergy sufferers.
why_choose_us.item3_desc: We give each material the right procedure and the right products.

process.title: How it works
process.subtitle: A few clicks, a clear price and professional cleaning right at your home.
process.step1_desc: Household cleaning, upholstery cleaning or regular care. Exactly according to your needs.
process.step2_desc: Address, date, scope. No phone calls, no waiting for a response.
process.step3_desc: The price is fixed and visible in advance. You will confirm the booking within seconds.
process.step4: We will assign you a professional
process.step4_desc: As soon as a verified cleaner accepts the order, you will receive a confirmation with their name and rating.
process.step5: We will arrive at your place
process.step5_desc: At the agreed time, fully equipped and ready to get to work.

benefits.title: What you get with our service
benefits.b1: Less worries — You can place your order online without delays, calls and unnecessary negotiations.
benefits.b2: More time for yourself — We will take care of the cleaning for you, while you can focus on more important things.
benefits.b3: Professional approach — Experienced team, proven procedures and attention to detail.
benefits.b4: Clean and fresh home — Results that can be seen and felt.

s1.name: General Cleaning
s1.desc: Standard cleaning of all rooms including dusting, vacuuming, and sanitizing.

s2.name: Deep Cleaning
s2.desc: Thorough cleaning including baseboards, inside appliances, and detailed sanitization.

s3.name: Upholstery Cleaning
s3.desc: Professional cleaning of sofas, armchairs, and other upholstered furniture.

services.title: Services & Pricing
services.subtitle: Choose the service that fits your needs. All prices include professional equipment and eco products.

before_after.title: See the Difference
before_after.subtitle: Drag the slider to see real before and after results from our cleanings.

t1.text: Incredible cleaning of sofas and carpets — like brand new! Great communication and fast service. Highly recommend to everyone!
t1.author: Anna

t2.text: Clean carpets and upholstery, results exceeded expectations! All stains gone. Very professional, concrete approach, great team.
t2.author: Igor

t3.text: We tried several companies — Cleansia are the best. Our mattresses and carpets are now perfectly clean and smell wonderful.
t3.author: Radmila

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Get in touch with our team and we'll be happy to help.

q1.question: Do you also travel outside Prague?
q1.answer: Yes, we cover surrounding areas up to approximately 30 km from Prague. For more distant locations, contact us — we will find a solution.

q2.question: Do I have to be at home during the cleaning?
q2.answer: It is not necessary. Many clients hand over the keys or let us in and leave. We work independently and reliably.

q3.question: Do you bring your own equipment and products?
q3.answer: Yes, we always arrive fully equipped. We use professional machines and gentle, certified products.

q4.question: Can you clean furniture with delicate upholstery?
q4.answer: Yes, we select gentle cleaning agents and methods appropriate for each fabric type: silk, wool, velvet, microfibre and more. Before cleaning, we always test on a small area to make sure the fabric won't be damaged.

q5.question: Do you remove all stains completely?
q5.answer: We remove up to 95% of stains. Some very old or chemically set stains may lighten significantly but not disappear fully — we will always inform you honestly about the expected result.

q6.question: Can I book cleaning in the evening or on weekends?
q6.answer: Yes. We offer flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends to fit your schedule.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.desc: Book your professional cleaning today and enjoy a healthier, fresher home.

footer.newsletter_title: Subscribe to our newsletter to get the latest updates
footer.newsletter_subtitle: Get 20% off on your first order just by subscribing to our newsletter.
footer.unsubscribe_note: You will be able to unsubscribe at any time.
footer.description: Professional mobile cleaning services. Furniture, carpets, mattresses — we come to you.

terms_page.title: Terms of Service
terms_page.intro: Please read these terms of service carefully before using our services.
terms_page.section1_text: By accessing and using Cleansia's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
terms_page.section2_text: Cleansia provides professional cleaning services for residential customers. Services include furniture cleaning, carpet cleaning, mattress cleaning, and other related services as listed on our website.
terms_page.section3_text: Orders can be placed through our website. Payment is accepted via credit/debit card (processed by Stripe) or cash on delivery. Prices are displayed in CZK and include VAT.
terms_page.section4_text: Cancellations are free until a cleaner accepts your booking. Once accepted: free 24+ hours before start, 25% fee 4-24 hours before, 50% fee under 4 hours before start.
terms_page.section5_text: Cleansia takes utmost care during cleaning. In the unlikely event of damage, please report the issue within 24 hours through our dispute system. We will investigate and resolve all claims fairly.
terms_page.section6_text: For questions regarding these terms, please contact us at info@cleansia.cz or +420 739 788 108.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy_page.section1_text: We collect personal information you provide when placing orders, creating an account, or contacting us. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and address.
privacy_page.section2_text: Your data is used to process orders, communicate about your bookings, improve our services, and send marketing communications (only with your consent).
privacy_page.section3_text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data. Your payment information is processed securely by Stripe and is never stored on our servers.
privacy_page.section4_text: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and export your personal data. You can manage these rights through your account's Privacy & Data section, or by contacting us directly.
privacy_page.section5_text: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences through the cookie consent banner.
privacy_page.section6_text: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at info@cleansia.cz or +420 739 788 108.
